overview: This onboarding journey introduces you to the Next.js and Prisma starter repository, focusing on application entry points, core UI components, and shared utility logic to establish a solid foundation for feature development.

days.title: Project Foundation and Entry Points
days.objective: Understand the main application layout and entry points to navigate the global structure.

steps.reason: Examine the root application structure and layout configuration.
Explore the primary landing page content and layout invocation.
Review global styling and CSS configurations.

days.title: UI Component Architecture
days.objective: Master how the Quotes feature is built using smaller, modular React components.

steps.reason: Understand the input handling for creating new entries.
Observe how individual quote items are mapped and displayed.
Study the implementation of loading states to improve user experience.
Dive into the individual quote display component details.

days.title: Logic, Types, and Integration
days.objective: Explore the backend-to-frontend connection and shared architectural utilities.

steps.reason: Learn how the component layer wraps functionality and handles logic.
Review TypeScript definitions for data integrity across the app.
Analyze shared helper functions used throughout the business logic.
